---
title: "Research Assistants"
description: |
  Meet our Research Assistants contributing to diverse research projects and 
  computational workflows. Each profile highlights expertise, skills, and 
  research involvement.

  Features:
  - Profile cards with image and details
  - Research interest tags
  - Project involvement
  - GitHub / profile links
  - Filter by expertise areas
format: html

listing:
  contents:
    - ra1
    - ra2
    - ra3
    - ra4
    - ra5
    - ra6
    - ra7
    - ra8
    - ra9
    - ra10
  type: grid
  image-align: left
  image-height: 180px
  fields: [title, description, categories, image]
  grid-item-border: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  categories: true
---
```
